en_body:
The moon is so clear and poetry all silk
Clouds are all dream and blue is pale-blue
I walk within love's sound everywhere entwining
Oh, my heart's voice is like a lullaby wind!

Night is so tender and violet velvet deepens
The cradle so embracing and I so good
Love is all love and tenderness drunkened
You ascend Love's throne like a star with the heavens high.

Offering You: returning only to those lotus lips
All my dreams gathered in embrace, the garment's folds still shining whole
How real the Universe becomes, like poetic flesh and skin
Moon, stars and sun shine trembling upon dream's eyelashes
Since the heart...
...began sobbing, beating the rhythm that calls Your Name!

Offering You: returning to each divine finger
Oh, soft skin remembers, drunkened with the glorious fragrance of Your love
Earth grows softer, flowers suddenly silken
Wind caresses, and rain falls cooler in droplets
Sunshine is too honeyed, and leaves too fragrant
The blue sweep of sky, clouds hammock the silken poetry of heaven
...oh remembrance, oh longing...
note: Lotus lips join erotic devotion to the lotus's Buddhist associations of purity and awakening.
